EditModeWarning: Active Effects are not applied while in Edit mode. Base values are displayed and used for all rolls, calculations and actions.

SETTINGS.CreateSystemJournalHint: If disabled, the System Journal will not be automatically created on load.
SETTINGS.RoundUpDamageApplicationHint: When enabled, damage is rounded up to the nearest whole number. When disabled, damage is rounded down.
SETTINGS.AllowTargetDamageApplicationHint: Whether or not to allow damage and healing on chat messages to be applied to targeted tokens in addition to selected tokens. Targeting does not require permissions, so this can allow players and GMs to apply damage to ANY token they can see.
SETTINGS.DamageApplicationChatCardHint: Controls when to send chat cards summarizing damage/healing applications with revert functionality.

KeywordsUsageList.GameMechanics: Defines special rules and mechanics for your game
KeywordsUsageList.References: Can be referenced in text and chat cards via @keyword
KeywordsUsageList.Documentation: Provide clear explanations for players and GMs

DamageTypeEffectsList.Usage: Can be used in damage rolls and calculations
DamageTypeEffectsList.Resistances: May have associated resistances and bonuses
DamageTypeEffectsList.ChoiceFields: Appears in damage type choice fields

StatusEffectUsageList.TokenApplication: Can be applied to tokens on the canvas
StatusEffectUsageList.MenuAppearance: Appear in the token status effects menu
StatusEffectUsageList.VisualIndicators: Provide visual indicators of character state

OperatorLabels.LessThanOrEqual: is less than or equal to
OperatorLabels.GreaterThanOrEqual: is greater than or equal to
